infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:20, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 69 Date 23 May 2026 Time 16:41 No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hami

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:20, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 69
Date 23 May 2026
Time 16:41
No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hamilton
Reason Alleged breach of Article B4.1.1 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Car 44 allegedly
impeding Car 10 in turn 8 at 16:04.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
